overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves under an elevated highway past outdoor seating areas, passes two NPCs sitting on a bench, and continues through neon-lit streets with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with outdoor cafe seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass toward a bench area with outdoor seating visible on the left

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the width of the street above
low industrial building with yellow facade and dark trim
cluster of blue chairs and tables under green umbrellas
tall street light illuminating the area with warm yellow light
tall palm tree visible in the distance against the night sky
low concrete wall running along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city at night. The area is dimly lit by street lamps, with outdoor cafe seating visible on the left and a concrete retaining wall on the right. Rain creates reflective wet surfaces on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with bench seating under overpass

events.description: slows slightly while approaching two individuals seated on a bench

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing two NPCs sitting on a concrete bench on the right side

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a concrete bench, one with green hair wearing blue pants and another in dark clothing with red pants

entered.detail: simple concrete bench with two people seated
large illuminated billboard mounted on the overpass structure displaying advertisements
blue industrial trash bins lined against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues under the overpass and approaches a concrete bench where two NPCs are seated. A large neon billboard is visible mounted on the overpass structure above. The ground transitions from asphalt to concrete sidewalk as the player passes the seated individuals.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with holographic advertisements and neon signage

events.description: turns left to continue under the overpass toward the intersection
moves from covered walkway to more open intersection area with increased neon lighting and holographic signs

agents.ego_description: turning left and proceeding toward an intersection, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking under the overpass in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing with red accents

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement displaying animated characters in bright colors
tall modern building with illuminated windows and neon accents
yellow and black striped barrier blocking off part of the street

segments.scene_description: After passing the bench, the camera turns left and moves toward a more open intersection area. The environment becomes more exposed to the rain with vibrant neon holographic advertisements visible on the right. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction as the player approaches the intersection with futuristic buildings lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered gloom of a massive highway overpass into the vibrant, rain-soaked openness of a neon-lit city intersection. It begins by moving under the dimly lit concrete structure, passing outdoor cafe seating and reflective asphalt surfaces slick with rain. As the camera continues forward, the environment shifts toward a concrete sidewalk where two NPCs sit on a bench beneath a large, glowing neon billboard. The scene then opens up as the camera turns left, leaving the cover of the overpass to enter a more exposed area filled with brilliant holographic advertisements. Finally, the view glides toward a futuristic intersection lined with towering buildings, passing a lone pedestrian amidst the shimmering lights and falling rain.
